0.q: three candidate proteins interacting with BfPMHA during hypo-saline stress were screened, fructose–bisphosphate aldolase (BfFBA), glyceraldehyde 3-phosphate dehydrogenase (BfGAPDH), and manganese superoxide dismutase (BfMnSOD).

1.q: These interactions of BfPMHA with BfMnSOD, BfFBA, and BfGAPDH at the cell membrane were separately confirmed via bimolecular fluorescence complementation in rice protoplasts.

2.q: These interactions of BfPMHA with BfMnSOD, BfFBA, and BfGAPDH at the cell membrane were separately confirmed via bimolecular fluorescence complementation in rice protoplasts.

3.q: These interactions of BfPMHA with BfMnSOD, BfFBA, and BfGAPDH at the cell membrane were separately confirmed via bimolecular fluorescence complementation in rice protoplasts.

4.q: These interactions of BfPMHA with BfMnSOD, BfFBA, and BfGAPDH at the cell membrane were separately confirmed via bimolecular fluorescence complementation in rice protoplasts.
